must_detect.matched_text:
9 Paperbark Lane, Warrinyah NSW 2229, +61 2 7010 1122.
We collect personal information under the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) for HR, WHS, payroll, and ASX/ASIC disclosure controls; we do not access your camera, microphone, or device MAC address, and basic staff directories may be sourced from publicly available profiles.
For site medical clearance at Karringup pit, Dr. Elodie Parata recorded Mr. Brendan Irawan’s cardiac rehabilitation notes (health) and enrolled his fingerprint template for the Telopea Gate (biometric) with explicit consent, to be retained 2 years post-separation unless a WHS incident extends the period.
Ms. Zahra Hoy’s parental leave file lists her child Aisha (age 13) as emergency contact only; such minor data is reviewed annually and deleted 12 months after replacement.
Mr. Owen Tai’s declared membership of the Riverport Technicians Union is used solely for payroll deductions; no political opinions are inferred and no profiling is conducted.
Any use of the term “union” in our values statement refers to teamwork, not to industrial association data, and references to “political capital” in project retros are metaphors only.
As an ASX-listed issuer, we handle MNPI (e.g., pre-close revenue schedules and draft reserve estimates) that is not generally available and would be expected to influence financial products; access is limited to the Company Secretary and Designated Insiders under our Securities Dealing Policy.
On 2026-03-15, Mrs. Tamsin Quade issued a blackout notice to Mr. Irawan and other Designated Persons; no trading in RGML ordinary shares or 2027 performance rights during the closed period.
Data retention: visitor logs 90 days; biometric templates 2 years post-separation; health records per WHS and workers compensation law; payroll and credit-related records 7 years; MNPI artifacts in the Board portal (QuokkaCloud Eucalypt SSO) 7 years.
Cross-border disclosures are limited to our payroll vendor WattlePay Pty (Sydney) and hosting in an ap-southeast-2 equivalent region operated by an Australian cloud provider; we apply APP 8 with contractual measures and conduct transfer risk assessments.
Access/DSAR: submit at http://privacy.redgum-minerals.example.au/dsar?rq=AU-7a9c%2F19 or email privacy@redgum-minerals.example.au; include employee No: AU-0lO-7Q3 and site “Karringup pit” for faster lookup.
Identifiers in OCR-scans may appear obfuscated, e.g., Emp No: A U - 0 l O - 7 Q 3 or card U I D: rgm-98 3-xy; we verify via the HR portal only and never request passwords by email.
Complaints: contact the Privacy Officer, Mr. Dillon Yue, at d.yue@redgum-minerals.example.au
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
